description: Austrian digital therapeutics company offering app-based physiotherapy programs. CE-marked medical device for back pain and MSK conditions. Used by insurers and employers.
business_model: B2B2C - Sold to insurers and employers who offer to members
target_market: Austria, Germany - health insurers, employers, rehabilitation clinics
competitive_advantage: CE-marked medical device, clinical evidence, German-speaking market focus

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary MSK solution - could integrate with occupational health offering
